02015| 
02016|       const { sendTransaction: sendTx, waitForTransactionReceipt } = await import('wagmi/actions')
02017|       const { wagmiConfig } = await import('@/lib/blockchain/wagmi')
02018|       const { createPublicClient: mkClient, http: mkHttp, defineChain: mkChain } = await import('viem')
02019| 
02020|       // Build a public client using the Relay chain's own RPC for accurate gas estimation.
02021|       // This works even for chains not in wagmiConfig.
02022|       const chainDef = mkChain({
02023|         id: batchChain.id,
02024|         name: batchChain.displayName,
02025|         nativeCurrency: {
02026|           name: batchChain.currency.name,
02027|           symbol: batchChain.currency.symbol,
02028|           decimals: batchChain.currency.decimals,
02029|         },
02030|         rpcUrls: { default: { http: [batchChain.httpRpcUrl] } },
02031|       })
02032|       const publicClient = mkClient({ chain: chainDef, transport: mkHttp(batchChain.httpRpcUrl) })
02033| 
02034|       // Collect ALL transaction-kind steps in order (approve, deposit, swap, etc.)
02035|       const txSteps: Array<{
02036|         stepId: string
02037|         stepLabel: string
02038|         to: `0x${string}`
02039|         data: `0x${string}`
02040|         value: bigint
02041|         checkEndpoint?: string
02042|       }> = []
02043| 
02044|       for (const step of multiQuote.steps) {
02045|         if (step.kind !== 'transaction' || !step.items?.length) continue
02046|         for (const item of step.items) {
02047|           const d = item.data
02048|           txSteps.push({
02049|             stepId: step.id,
02050|             stepLabel: step.id === 'approve' ? 'Approval' : step.id === 'deposit' ? 'Deposit' : step.action || step.id,
02051|             to: d.to as `0x${string}`,
02052|             data: d.data as `0x${string}`,
02053|             // Relay sometimes sends '0x0' or missing value — normalise to 0n
02054|             value: d.value && d.value !== '0x0' ? BigInt(d.value) : 0n,
02055|             checkEndpoint: item.check?.endpoint,
02056|           })
02057|         }
02058|       }
02059| 
02060|       console.log('Total tx steps to execute:', txSteps.length, txSteps.map(s => s.stepId))
02061| 
02062|       if (txSteps.length === 0) {
02063|         toast.error('No transactions to execute in quote.')
02064|         setIsSwapping(false)
02065|         return
02066|       }
02067| 
02068|       // Estimate gas for every step using the chain's RPC before prompting any signatures.
02069|       // We deliberately do NOT pass maxFeePerGas/maxPriorityFeePerGas from the Relay quote —
02070|       // those values are stale by the time the user signs and cause wallets to show inflated fees.
02071|       // Letting the wallet/node pick current gas prices is always more accurate.
02072|       const gasLimits = await Promise.all(
02073|         txSteps.map(async (step) => {
02074|           try {
02075|             const estimated = await publicClient.estimateGas({
02076|               account: address as `0x${string}`,
02077|               to: step.to,
02078|               data: step.data,
02079|               value: step.value,
02080|             })
02081|             return (estimated * 130n) / 100n  // 1.3x buffer
02082|           } catch (e) {
02083|             console.warn(`Gas estimation failed for step ${step.stepId}:`, e)
02084|             return undefined
02085|           }
02086|         })
02087|       )
02088| 
02089|       toast.info(`Executing ${txSteps.length} step(s)...`)
02090| 
02091|       let confirmedCount = 0
02092|       const failedTxs: number[] = []
02093| 
02094|       for (let i = 0; i < txSteps.length; i++) {
02095|         const step = txSteps[i]
02096|         console.log(`Step ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length}: ${step.stepId}`, {
02097|           to: step.to,
02098|           value: step.value.toString(),
02099|           gas: gasLimits[i]?.toString(),
02100|         })
02101|         try {
02102|           const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {
02103|             to: step.to,
02104|             data: step.data,
02105|             value: step.value,
02106|             gas: gasLimits[i],
02107|             // Explicitly omit maxFeePerGas / maxPriorityFeePerGas so the wallet
02108|             // uses current network prices instead of the stale values from the quote
02109|           })
02110|           console.log(`Step ${i + 1} (${step.stepId}) submitted:`, hash)
02111|           toast.info(`${step.stepLabel} ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length} submitted...`)
02112| 
02113|           // Wait for on-chain confirmation
02114|           await waitForTransactionReceipt(wagmiConfig, { hash })
02115|           confirmedCount++
02116|           console.log(`Step ${i + 1} (${step.stepId}) confirmed`)
02117|
